title: OpsState
description: State schema for ops/execute intent — service health and operational context.

service_status.description: Map of service name → status string (e.g. {'api': 'degraded', 'db': 'healthy'})

recent_changes.description: Recent deploys, config changes, or migrations

health_checks.description: Health check results or probe summaries

env_drift.description: Environment variable or config drift detected between envs
